prs_reviewed.title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths

skipped.reason: 33 PRs skipped: SHA unchanged since last review (skip_set)
175 new non-draft PRs skipped: all had human review activity (reviews or comments > 0)

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include auto-close keywords (Fixes #NN, closes #NN) in commit messages.
Approval style is warm and brief: 🎉 thanks! is the standard merge acknowledgment.
Reviewer @illume is primary maintainer; consistently requests rebase to remove merge-main commits.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — does not count as human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a maintenance need.
Frontend: fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable.
Backend: use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
